messages.content: I toured that house on Maple Ridge Drive in Circle C and loved it. The backyard was perfect for our golden retriever, Biscuit. Can we schedule a second showing this Saturday?

Wonderful, I'm glad you liked 4821 Maple Ridge Drive! I'll reach out to the listing agent to set up a second showing for this Saturday. That property is listed at $535,000 and has been on the market for 12 days, so it's still fresh. I'll confirm the time and send you the details.
